result.summary: Found 3 visual issues on the BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, primarily related to clipped/truncated content on the right edge of the viewport.

issues.description: Game cards in both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are visibly cut off on the right side. Game titles like 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...' are truncated mid-word with no scroll affordance (no arrows, no partial fade, no scroll indicator).
issues.suggestion: Add a visible horizontal scroll indicator such as a right-facing arrow, a fade gradient on the right edge, or a scroll progress indicator so users understand these rows are scrollable. Ensure partial cards are shown consistently to imply scrollability.

issues.description: The 'Hot Ga...' navigation tab in the top filter bar is cut off mid-word, making it unreadable and appearing broken rather than intentionally scrollable.
issues.suggestion: Add a subtle right-edge fade or arrow indicator to the navigation tab bar to communicate that more tabs exist and are accessible via scroll. Ensure the last visible tab is at least partially readable.

issues.description: The third game card in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' row shows only partial game art and title ('MAGNI PHO...'), giving no meaningful information to the user about what game it is.
issues.suggestion: Show at least 50% of the next card's content to tease scrollability, or redesign the grid to use a full-width carousel with navigation arrows so all content remains legible.
